title: chrysosplenium album var. stamineum
intro: Chrysosplenium album var. stamineum, also known as Yellow sedum or Golden sedum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. It is a perennial plant with yellow flowers that have a history of traditional use in herbal medicine, particularly in Asian cultures, where it is valued for its medicinal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Chrysosplenium album var. stamineum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusion, and tincture, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and relief from respiratory issues.
